creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
On Mon, Aug 04, 2008 at 12:27:34PM +0100, Robert Watson wrote:
> 
> On Mon, 28 Jan 2008, Jonathan Chen wrote:
> 
> >On Sun, Jan 27, 2008 at 12:44:23PM +0000, rwatson@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> >[..]
> >>If you boot a 7.0 kernel/modules with 6.x userspace, does the problem 
> >>still occur?
> >
> >Would you have the application packages for 6.x readily available for me 
> >to do this? I don't have any 6.x machines available to do a build for it.
> 
> I'm catching up on old bug reports, and it seems I lost track of this one. 
> What I'd basically like to do, at this point, is confirm whether:
> 
> (1) The problem still occurs on the latest 6-STABLE
> (2) The problem occurs on 7-STABLE at all

7-stable hasn't exhibited this problem from since I got onto it (just
before 7.0 release).

Cheers.
-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
